name: Practical Sex Education
description:
From now on, sex education is imparted to all legal adults. But since knowledge retention has been proven to be terrible, now it has to be practical.

Your teacher will guide you to learn how to do it in front of the class, wether with a girl she choses or with herself.

All characters are 18+

Learning poll

Follow me, it makes me happy
creator: KalzK
